Kingdom of Sky.notes: AA system introduced — one class tree per archetype

Echoes of Faydwer.notes: Subclass (Expertise) trees added — one per class; tradeskill AA tree added (own 45-pt cap, separate from the adventure cap)

Rise of Kunark.notes: AA cap increased, no new tree types

The Shadow Odyssey.notes: Shadows tree added — one per class, cross-archetype nodes

Sentinel's Fate.notes: AA cap increased, no new tree types

Destiny of Velious.notes: Heroic AA tree added — one per archetype

Age of Discovery.notes: General tradeskill AA tree added; Beastlord class introduced with Warder trees

Chains of Eternity.notes: Prestige trees added — two per class (conversion + expertise)
